# OOTB Consulting Group

> Expert boutique marketing and management consulting firm specializing in data-driven growth strategies for retail, hospitality, real estate, healthcare, and professional services businesses in Toronto and across Canada.

## Contact
- Address: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Email: hello@ootbconsulting.ca
- Website: https://www.outoftheboxca.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/ootbconsulting
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/outoftheboxca/

## About
OOTB Consulting Group combines omni-channel marketing and management consulting under one roof, measuring true ROI through data analytics. They serve established brands ready to scale and entrepreneurs at the launch stage.

## Services
- Business and growth strategy
- Marketing system design and execution
- CRM and automation setup
- Website and funnel development
- Content production and campaign management
- Event-driven lead generation
- Data tracking and performance reporting
- Brand refresh and identity

## Core Industries
- Retail (F&B / CPG)
- Restaurants (QSR / FSR)
- Real Estate: Franchises & Multi-Location
- Hospitality & Tourism
- Professional Services
- Healthcare
